summary: Bug fix verification: Pressable now only wraps exercise header row. TextInput taps in the detail panel no longer bubble up to the Pressable and no longer trigger swap mode. All 8 tests PASS (100%). Tested on workout-detail screen with workout ID 13879b5a-82d5-4fa1-8c68-a7e1a999b750.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified: exercise card Pressable now correctly only wraps the header row. TextInputs in detail panel are outside the Pressable. All tap/long-press/expand/collapse/replace flows working. Workout ID 13879b5a-82d5-4fa1-8c68-a7e1a999b750.

test_results.TEST_1_header_tap_expands: PASS - Tapping exercise header expands detail panel without entering swap mode
test_results.TEST_2_weight_input_no_swap: PASS - Tapping weight (kg) TextInput does NOT trigger swap mode or collapse detail
test_results.TEST_3_reps_input_no_swap: PASS - Tapping reps TextInput does NOT trigger swap mode or collapse detail
test_results.TEST_4_inputs_accept_text: PASS - weight='80' and reps='10' entered; swap banner never appeared
test_results.TEST_5_replace_button_opens_modal: PASS - Replace button in detail panel opens Replace Exercise modal with 50 exercises
test_results.TEST_6_long_press_enters_swap: PASS - Long-press (900ms) on exercise header correctly shows 'Tap any exercise to swap' banner and collapses detail panel
test_results.TEST_7_expand_collapse: PASS - First tap expands exercise; second tap on same header collapses it
test_results.TEST_8_rapid_input_taps_no_swap: PASS - 3 rapid alternating weight/reps taps never triggered swap mode

rca_of_issue: Root cause: previously the entire exercise card (including TextInputs) was wrapped in a single <Pressable> with onPress/onLongPress handlers. Touch events on TextInputs inside the Pressable would bubble up and potentially trigger the card's handlers. Fix: the Pressable now only wraps the renderExerciseHeader() component (the header row with exercise name/chevron). The renderExerciseDetailPanel() (containing TextInputs, checkboxes, Replace/Delete buttons) is a sibling <View> placed outside the Pressable at the same card level. Touch events in the detail panel can no longer reach the Pressable handlers.
